---
pagetitle: Mohamed Bakr - Contact
title: Get in Touch
page-layout: article
---

::: {#contact}
::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .contact-info}

### {{< fa comments >}} Let's connect

I'd love to hear about your project, a data science challenge, or anything else on your mind. Fill out the form and I'll get back to you.

**Typically responds within 24–48 hours.**

::: {.contact-details}

<div class="contact-social">
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mohdbakr/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="LinkedIn Profile"><i class="fa-brands fa-linkedin"></i></a>
  <a href="https://github.com/Mohdbakr" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="GitHub Profile"><i class="fa-brands fa-github"></i></a>
</div>

:::

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/xqkrnzvp" method="POST">

::: {.grid .contact-form-grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<input type="text" class="form-control" placeholder="Full Name" id="name" name="name" required>
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
<input type="text" class="form-control" placeholder="Phone" id="phone" name="phone" required>
:::
::: {.g-col-12}
<input type="email" class="form-control" placeholder="Email Address" id="email" name="email" required>
:::
::: {.g-col-12}
<input type="text" class="form-control" placeholder="Enter Subject" id="subject" name="subject" required>
:::
::: {.g-col-12}
<textarea class="form-control" placeholder="Your message…" id="message" name="message" rows="6" required></textarea>
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .text-end}
<button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">{{< fa paper-plane >}} &nbsp;Send</button>
:::
:::

</form>

:::

:::
:::
